diagrams.title: PUE Calculation Model
diagrams.description: Shows how PUE is calculated as ratio of total facility energy to IT equipment energy
elements: Total Facility Energy (includes cooling, lighting, IT equipment)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding energy efficiency metrics and identifying waste sources

diagrams.title: VM Consolidation Process
diagrams.description: Visualizes the process of moving multiple VMs from underutilized servers to fewer servers
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrating energy savings through workload consolidation

diagrams.title: Green Cloud Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows components of sustainable cloud computing infrastructure
diagrams.purpose: Understanding integrated approach to sustainable cloud infrastructure
